message:
Command `DESIGN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

nohup /home/user/.nix-profile/bin/librelane \
    "$DESIGN_DIR/config.json" \
    --flow Classic \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v4 \
    --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting \
    > /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log 2>&1 &

echo "LibreLane DRT restart PID: $!"
echo $! > /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.pid
sleep 30
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED EARLY"
tail -15 /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log` executed with exit code 0.

content:
LibreLane DRT restart PID: 520092
ENDED EARLY
[06:02:45] WARNING  [OpenROAD.DetailedRouting] [STA-0441]            flow.py:702
                    set_output_delay relative to a clock defined on             
                    the same port/pin not allowed. (and 1 similar               
                    warnings)                                                   
[06:02:45] WARNING  [OpenROAD.DetailedRouting] [DRT-0349]            flow.py:702
                    LEF58_ENCLOSURE with no CUTCLASS is not                     
                    supported. Skipping for layer mcon (and 9                   
                    similar warnings)                                           
[06:02:45] ERROR    The following error was encountered while    __main__.py:190
                    running the flow:                                           
                    OpenROAD.DetailedRouting failed with the                    
                    following errors:                                           
                    [DRT-0302] Unsupported multiple pins on                     
                    bterm VDDIO                                                 
[06:02:45] ERROR    LibreLane will now quit.                     __main__.py:191

extras.command:
DESIGN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

nohup /home/user/.nix-profile/bin/librelane \
    "$DESIGN_DIR/config.json" \
    --flow Classic \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v4 \
    --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting \
    > /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log 2>&1 &

echo "LibreLane DRT restart PID: $!"
echo $! > /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.pid
sleep 30
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED EARLY"
tail -15 /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log
